title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is a generative UI demo application showcased at Google Cloud Next '26 that uses Flutter and Firebase with Gemini to generate personalized latte art images on demand. The app leverages agentic features and Agent-to-UI technology to enable real-time co-creation of customized user experiences.
writeup: This video breaks down GenLatte, a generative UI demo from Google Cloud Next '26 that pairs Flutter and Firebase with Gemini to generate personalized latte art images on demand. It matters as a concrete example of agentic development moving from chat output into live interface generation. The key takeaways: the app uses agent orchestration and Agent-to-UI technology to drive real-time co-creation, and customized user experiences are assembled dynamically rather than prebuilt.
